Class Computer

java.lang.Object
Player.Player
Player.Computer
public class Computer extends Player
The Computer class contains the logic of the computer player

  • Method Details

    • turnAlgorithm

      public boolean turnAlgorithm(TokenBank tb, DevelopmentCardFaceUP developmentFaceUp, DevelopmentCardDeck developmentDesk, int winningCondition, NobleFaceUP nobleFaceUp)
      Executes the Computer's turn by doing these steps: 1. Looks for development cards it can buy 1a. Looks through reserve 1b. Looks through market 2. If cannot buy development cards, takes three random tokens 3. If cannot take three tokens, takes two tokens 4. If cannot take two tokens, reserve a development card 5. Ends the turn 6. If is eligible for a noble, takes a noble
      Parameters:
      tb - the token bank
      developmentFaceUp - development cards currently face up on the table
      developmentDesk - the current deck of development cards
      winningCondition - amount of points needed to win
      nobleFaceUp - nobles currently on the table
      Returns:
      a Boolean value indicating whether Computer has reached the winning condition or not
